# clang trunk: assertion "E->isPRValue() && E->getType()->isIntegralOrEnumerationType()" in EvaluateIntegerOrLValue during constexpr eval of arithmetic on _Atomic cast of array element

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173918
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-29T20:37:34Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/W37Y7n5jh

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer


## Code
```c
void gl_fog_index_pixels(float f, unsigned int n, unsigned int index[]) {
  unsigned int i;
  for (i = 0; i < n; i++)
    index[i] = (unsigned int)((_Atomic)index[i] + (1.0F - f));
}
```

## Code
```c
void gl_fog_index_pixels(float f, unsigned int n, unsigned int index[]) {
  unsigned int i;
  for (i = 0; i &lt; n; i++)
    index[i] = (unsigned int)((_Atomic)index[i] + (1.0F - f));
}
```
</details>
